ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item (e.g., Warhammer, Quarterstaff) */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item (e.g., weapon, armor, tool) */,
  "item_tier" TEXT /* Tier of the item (e.g., common, rare) */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "item_rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the item (e.g., common, uncommon, rare, legendary) */,
  "item_value" REAL /* Value or cost of the item in the game's currency */,
  "item_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource (e.g., Wood, Metal, Bone) */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., common, rare) */,
  "resource_tier" TEXT /* Tier of the resource (e.g., common, rare) */,
  "resource_description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "resource_value" REAL /* Value or cost of the resource in the game's currency */,
  "resource_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipes" (
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipe */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being crafted */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource required */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the resource required */,
  "recipe_name" TEXT /* Name of the recipe */,
  "recipe_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the recipe (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "recipe_time" INTEGER /* Time required to craft the item using the recipe */,
  "recipe_description" TEXT /* Description of the recipe */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipes_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipes_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "royal_permits" (
  "permit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each royal permit */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item that can be crafted using the permit */,
  "permit_name" TEXT /* Name of the royal permit */,
  "permit_description" TEXT /* Description of the royal permit */,
  "permit_rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the royal permit (e.g., common, rare) */,
  "permit_value" REAL /* Value or cost of the royal permit in the game's currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_royal_permits_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enchantments" (
  "enchantment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enchantment */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being enchanted */,
  "gemstone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gemstone used for enchantment */,
  "enchantment_name" TEXT /* Name of the enchantment */,
  "enchantment_effect" TEXT /* Effect of the enchantment (e.g., +5 attack, +10 defense) */,
  "enchantment_description" TEXT /* Description of the enchantment */,
  "enchantment_value" REAL /* Value or cost of the enchantment in the game's currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enchantment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enchantments_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enchantments_gemstone_id FOREIGN KEY ("gemstone_id") REFERENCES gemstones ("gemstone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gemstones" (
  "gemstone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gemstone */,
  "gemstone_name" TEXT /* Name of the gemstone */,
  "gemstone_type" TEXT /* Type of the gemstone (e.g., common, rare) */,
  "gemstone_effect" TEXT /* Effect of the gemstone when used for enchantment */,
  "gemstone_value" REAL /* Value or cost of the gemstone in the game's currency */,
  "gemstone_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the gemstone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gemstone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_resources" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource required */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the resource required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id", "resource_id")
)
